---
title: "DataScouteR"
subtitle: "Football Transfer Analytics · Powered by R"
---

```{=html}
<div style="margin:2rem 0 3rem;max-width:720px;">

  <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.68rem;color:#1A4D2E;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1.2rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.7rem;">
    <span style="display:inline-block;width:28px;height:2px;background:#1A4D2E;"></span>
    Data-Driven Football Intelligence
  </div>

  <p style="font-family:'Playfair Display',Georgia,serif;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4.5vw,3rem);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-0.02em;line-height:1.1;color:#1A1A1A;margin-bottom:1.4rem;">
    Transfer intelligence<br/>built on real data.
  </p>

  <p style="font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;line-height:1.75;color:#3D3D3D;max-width:540px;margin-bottom:2rem;">
    DataScouteR combines distribution analysis, non-parametric statistics, and
    empirical backtesting to evaluate football transfers across 25+ global leagues.
  </p>

  <div style="display:flex;gap:0.9rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:3.5rem;">
    <a href="gre1.qmd" style="font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:0.88rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.7rem 1.6rem;background:#1A4D2E;color:white;border-radius:3px;text-decoration:none;border-bottom:none;letter-spacing:0.01em;">
      Browse Transfer Cards
    </a>
    <a href="about.qmd" style="font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:0.88rem;font-weight:500;padding:0.7rem 1.6rem;background:transparent;color:#1A1A1A;border-radius:3px;text-decoration:none;border:1px solid #D8D4CC;border-bottom:none;letter-spacing:0.01em;">
      About this project
    </a>
  </div>

  <!-- Stats row -->
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:0;border:1px solid #D8D4CC;border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;background:white;margin-bottom:0;">
    <div style="text-align:center;padding:1.4rem 1rem;border-right:1px solid #D8D4CC;">
      <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:800;color:#1A4D2E;letter-spacing:-0.02em;">4</div>
      <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.58rem;color:#6B6B6B;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-top:0.25rem;">Seasons</div>
    </div>
    <div style="text-align:center;padding:1.4rem 1rem;border-right:1px solid #D8D4CC;">
      <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:800;color:#1A4D2E;letter-spacing:-0.02em;">25+</div>
      <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.58rem;color:#6B6B6B;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-top:0.25rem;">Leagues</div>
    </div>
    <div style="text-align:center;padding:1.4rem 1rem;border-right:1px solid #D8D4CC;">
      <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:800;color:#1A4D2E;letter-spacing:-0.02em;">6</div>
      <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.58rem;color:#6B6B6B;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-top:0.25rem;">Positions</div>
    </div>
    <div style="text-align:center;padding:1.4rem 1rem;">
      <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:800;color:#1A4D2E;letter-spacing:-0.02em;">12</div>
      <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.58rem;color:#6B6B6B;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-top:0.25rem;">Metrics</div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## What you'll find here

**Data-Driven Insights** — analytics on whether a player fits a club's tactical and statistical profile, based on data across 25+ leagues.

**Transfer Grading** — every transfer card shows a player's percentile ranking in the target league, a projection tier, strengths and risks per metric, and a backtest-derived historical hit rate.

Use the navigation bar above to explore transfer cards by league.

---

## Projection tiers

```{=html}
<table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.88rem;margin:1rem 0 2rem;background:white;border:1px solid #D8D4CC;border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;">
  <thead>
    <tr style="background:#F7F5F0;border-bottom:2px solid #1A1A1A;">
      <th style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6rem;color:#6B6B6B;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-align:left;padding:0.65rem 1rem;">Tier</th>
      <th style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6rem;color:#6B6B6B;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-align:left;padding:0.65rem 1rem;">Percentile</th>
      <th style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6rem;color:#6B6B6B;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-align:left;padding:0.65rem 1rem;">What it means</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #E8E4DC;">
      <td style="padding:0.75rem 1rem;"><span style="font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.22rem 0.65rem;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(139,105,20,0.1);color:#8B6914;">Elite / League Star</span></td>
      <td style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.72rem;color:#6B6B6B;padding:0.75rem 1rem;">≥ 90%</td>
      <td style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#3D3D3D;padding:0.75rem 1rem;">Top 10% — a genuinely standout signing.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #E8E4DC;">
      <td style="padding:0.75rem 1rem;"><span style="font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.22rem 0.65rem;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(26,77,46,0.08);color:#1A4D2E;">Top 5 Caliber</span></td>
      <td style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.72rem;color:#6B6B6B;padding:0.75rem 1rem;">75 – 89%</td>
      <td style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#3D3D3D;padding:0.75rem 1rem;">Top quarter — high-quality starter.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #E8E4DC;">
      <td style="padding:0.75rem 1rem;"><span style="font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.22rem 0.65rem;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(27,79,138,0.07);color:#1B4F8A;">Reliable Starter</span></td>
      <td style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.72rem;color:#6B6B6B;padding:0.75rem 1rem;">50 – 74%</td>
      <td style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#3D3D3D;padding:0.75rem 1rem;">Above median — solid, consistent contributor.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #E8E4DC;">
      <td style="padding:0.75rem 1rem;"><span style="font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.22rem 0.65rem;border-radius:3px;background:#F7F5F0;color:#6B6B6B;border:1px solid #D8D4CC;">Rotation / Squad</span></td>
      <td style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.72rem;color:#6B6B6B;padding:0.75rem 1rem;">25 – 49%</td>
      <td style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#3D3D3D;padding:0.75rem 1rem;">Below median — useful depth or developing player.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding:0.75rem 1rem;"><span style="font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.22rem 0.65rem;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(196,80,42,0.08);color:#C4502A;">Below Average</span></td>
      <td style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.72rem;color:#6B6B6B;padding:0.75rem 1rem;">< 25%</td>
      <td style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#3D3D3D;padding:0.75rem 1rem;">Bottom quarter — transfer carries performance risk.</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

> **Leagues currently covered:** Greek Super League (GRE1). Additional leagues will be published as transfer windows progress.

---

## How to read the cards

Every transfer card on DataScouteR is built from the same set of rules. Understanding them makes every number meaningful.

### Metrics are position-specific

Each metric is calculated and ranked **only against players who play the same position**. A Striker's Scoring percentile is compared to other Strikers — not to Centre Backs or Goalkeepers. This matters because positions have completely different statistical profiles. A 72% Scoring for a Central Midfielder means something very different from a 72% Scoring for a Forward. The comparison is always apples to apples.

The six positions modelled are: **Goalkeeper · Centre Back · Wing Back · Central Midfielder · Winger · Forward**. Metrics are selected per position to reflect what actually matters at each role.

### Percentiles are based on the most recent season only

The percentile ranking for a player uses **only their most recent season's statistics** — not a career average. A player who was elite two seasons ago but declined in 25/26 is ranked on their 25/26 form. This is intentional: transfers are decisions about a player's current profile, not their historical peak.

### What a percentile actually means

```{=html}
<div style="background:white;border:1px solid #D8D4CC;border-radius:4px;padding:1.4rem 1.6rem;margin:1.2rem 0 2rem;">
  <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6rem;color:#6B6B6B;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-bottom:1.2rem;border-bottom:1px solid #E8E4DC;padding-bottom:0.6rem;">How to read a percentile number</div>
  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;">

    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:52px 1fr;gap:1rem;align-items:start;">
      <span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:500;color:#1A4D2E;">72%</span>
      <span style="font-size:0.88rem;color:#3D3D3D;line-height:1.6;">This player outperforms <strong style="color:#1A1A1A;">72 out of every 100</strong> players at the same position in the target league on this metric. They rank in the top 28%.</span>
    </div>

    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:52px 1fr;gap:1rem;align-items:start;border-top:1px solid #E8E4DC;padding-top:1rem;">
      <span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:500;color:#1B4F8A;">50%</span>
      <span style="font-size:0.88rem;color:#3D3D3D;line-height:1.6;">This player is exactly at the <strong style="color:#1A1A1A;">league median</strong> for this metric. Half the league is above them, half below.</span>
    </div>

    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:52px 1fr;gap:1rem;align-items:start;border-top:1px solid #E8E4DC;padding-top:1rem;">
      <span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:500;color:#C4502A;">33%</span>
      <span style="font-size:0.88rem;color:#3D3D3D;line-height:1.6;">This player is <strong style="color:#1A1A1A;">below the median</strong>. Two thirds of their positional peers in the league post higher numbers on this metric.</span>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

### The three colour bands on every card

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.5rem;margin:1rem 0 2rem;">
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:150px 1fr;align-items:center;gap:1rem;">
    <span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:500;color:#1A4D2E;background:rgba(26,77,46,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(26,77,46,0.2);padding:0.28rem 0.7rem;border-radius:3px;text-align:center;">✦ STRENGTH ≥ 60%</span>
    <span style="font-size:0.88rem;color:#3D3D3D;">Clearly above the majority of positional peers at this level. A genuine asset a club can rely on.</span>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:150px 1fr;align-items:center;gap:1rem;">
    <span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:500;color:#1B4F8A;background:rgba(27,79,138,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(27,79,138,0.15);padding:0.28rem 0.7rem;border-radius:3px;text-align:center;">◈ NEUTRAL 40–59%</span>
    <span style="font-size:0.88rem;color:#3D3D3D;">Around the league median. Competent but not a differentiator either way.</span>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:150px 1fr;align-items:center;gap:1rem;">
    <span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:500;color:#C4502A;background:rgba(196,80,42,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(196,80,42,0.2);padding:0.28rem 0.7rem;border-radius:3px;text-align:center;">▼ RISK &lt; 40%</span>
    <span style="font-size:0.88rem;color:#3D3D3D;">Below the league median. The player will likely be exposed relative to peers at this level.</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

### What the asterisk (*) on each card means

Every transfer card carries a small footnote at the bottom. It states three things:

- **The comparison group** — which position and which league the percentile is drawn from
- **The data window** — the player's scores come from their most recent season only, not a career average
- **What the model cannot see** — injury history, tactical fit, psychological adaptation, and contract terms are outside the scope of this analysis

The asterisk is not a disclaimer to ignore. Data answers *how does this player rank statistically* — a club's scouts and coaching staff answer *does this player fit our specific system*.

---
